---
title: "NOSE"
output: html_document
---
# Set Up
```{r}
library(here)
library(readxl)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(strucchange)

theme_set(
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10),
      plot.caption     = element_text(color = "grey50", size = 8.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position  = "bottom"
    )
)

# Reference year for all indexing
REF_YEAR <- 2013
 
# Vertical-line annotations (institutional breaks)
BREAKS <- data.frame(
  x     = c(2016, 2021),
  label = c("Métropole AMP", "TH reform")
)
 
vlines <- function() {
  list(
    geom_vline(data = BREAKS, aes(xintercept = x),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "#E74C3C", alpha = 0.7),
    annotate("text", x = BREAKS$x + 0.15,
             y = -Inf, label = BREAKS$label,
             hjust = 0, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#E74C3C")
  )
}
```

# Data Set
```{r}
rei <- read.csv(here("cache", "rei.csv"))
```

# Integrated Analysis
## TFPB revenues
```{r}
g1 <- ggplot(rei, aes(x = annee, y = montant_reel / 1e6)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2C3E50", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "#2C3E50", size = 3) +
  vlines() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2013:2024) +
  labs(
    title   = "TFPB revenues in Marseille (2013–2024)",
    subtitle = "Actual revenues collected by the municipality",
    x = NULL, y = "Revenue (€ millions)",
    caption = "Source: REI, DGFiP"
  )
g1
```

## Rate vs base decomposition
```{R}
g2 <- rei %>%
  select(annee, effet_base, effet_taux) %>%
  pivot_longer(-annee, names_to = "component", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(component = recode(component,
    effet_base = "Base effect",
    effet_taux = "Rate effect"
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = annee, y = value / 1e6, fill = component)) +
  geom_col() +
  vlines() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Base effect" = "#3498DB", "Rate effect" = "#E74C3C")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2013:2024) +
  labs(
    title    = "Decomposition of TFPB revenue growth (2013–2024)",
    subtitle = paste0("Reference year: ", REF_YEAR, " (constant rate)"),
    x = NULL, y = "Revenue gap vs. reference year (M€)", fill = NULL,
    caption = "Source: REI, DGFiP"
  )
g2
```

## Indexed series
```{R}
g3 <- rei %>%
  select(annee, index_base, index_recettes, index_taux) %>%
  pivot_longer(-annee, names_to = "series", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(series = recode(series,
    index_base     = "Tax base",
    index_recettes = "Revenues",
    index_taux     = "Voted rate"
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = annee, y = value, color = series, group = series)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  vlines() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Tax base"   = "#3498DB",
    "Revenues"   = "#2ECC71",
    "Voted rate" = "#E74C3C"
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2013:2024) +
  labs(
    title   = "Tax base, voted rate and revenues — indexed (2013 = 100)",
    x = NULL, y = "Index (2013 = 100)", color = NULL,
    caption = "Source: REI, DGFiP"
  )
g3
```

## Base per article
```{R}
g4 <- ggplot(rei, aes(x = annee, y = base_par_article)) +
  geom_line(color = "#8E44AD", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "#8E44AD", size = 3) +
  vlines() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2013:2024) +
  labs(
    title   = "Average cadastral base per property (2013–2024)",
    subtitle = "Proxy for cadastral value drift",
    x = NULL, y = "Base per article (€)",
    caption = "Source: REI, DGFiP"
  )
g4
```

## Commune vs métropole rate split
```{R}
g5 <- rei %>%
  select(annee, taux_vote, taux_metro) %>%
  pivot_longer(-annee, names_to = "component", values_to = "rate") %>%
  mutate(component = recode(component,
    taux_vote  = "Municipality (Marseille)",
    taux_metro = "Métropole AMP"
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = annee, y = rate, fill = component)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.85) +
  vlines() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Municipality (Marseille)" = "#1565C0",
    "Métropole AMP"            = "#90CAF9"
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2013:2024) +
  labs(
    title    = "TFPB rate split: municipality vs. Métropole AMP",
    subtitle = "Marseille only controls the municipal portion",
    x = NULL, y = "Rate (%)", fill = NULL,
    caption = "Source: REI, DGFiP"
  )
g5
```

## Panel creation
```{r}
(g1 + g2) / (g3 + g4) / g5 +
  plot_annotation(
    title   = "Marseille TFPB — Full diagnostic (2013–2024)",
    caption = "Source: REI, DGFiP | Red dashed lines: institutional breaks"
  )
ggsave(here("output", "rei_diagnostic_panel.png"),
       width = 14, height = 15, dpi = 150)
```
